message:
feat(ffs-ondisk,ffs-core): extract device numbers for block/char inodes (bd-q0g)

Add device_number(), device_major(), device_minor() to Ext4Inode for
extracting major/minor from the i_block area (old 16-bit and new 32-bit
formats). Wire inode_to_attr() to populate rdev for block/char devices
instead of hardcoding 0. Adds 8 tests covering both formats and
non-device fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
